name: Apple Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease a 12-cup tube or bundt pan with Pam cooking spray.
3. In a small bowl, combine cinnamon and 1 tablespoon sugar; set aside.
4. Toss the prepared apples with the remaining cinnamon-sugar mixture.
5. In a large bowl, whisk together sugar, applesauce, vanilla, orange juice, salt, and lightly beaten eggs.
6. In another bowl, mix flour, baking powder, and nutmeg.
7. Fold the dry ingredients into the wet mixture until just combined.
8. Spoon more than one third of the batter into the prepared pan.
9. Cover with half of the apple mixture.
10. Spoon in the remaining batter and apple slices.
11. Sprinkle the top lightly with the reserved cinnamon-sugar.
12. Bake for 1 hour or until done.
13. Loosen sides with a butter knife, then invert the cake onto a plate for serving.
